chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-163 & 228 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 27.06.2023 Mr. Abdullah K. Laghari, advocate for petitioner along with petitioner in C.P. No.S-163/2023. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang advocate for petitioner in C.P. No.S- 228 of 2023 / alleged detainee in C.P. No.S-163/2023. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG along with Inspector Mir Muhammad Kaloi SHO PS Kadhan, District Badin, on behalf of SSP Badin. ----- Alleged detainee Mst. Shair Bano is present and submits that she is living happily with her parents and does not want to go with petitioner Muhammad Ramzan. In view of above, these petitions are disposed of. Show cause notice ordered against SHO PS Kadhan is hereby recalled. Police to act in accordance with and not cause harassment to either party. JUDGE Ali Haider
